summary: Code Quality Q2 batch testing completed successfully. Hook dependency cleanup refactoring verified - no regressions found. Both Plasiyer and Customer dashboards load correctly with proper data fetching.

issues: Minor Recharts warning about chart dimensions (-1x-1) during initial render - cosmetic only, charts render correctly after

critical_code_review_comments: CustomerDashboard.js refactor is correct - loadStats runs on mount, loadDashboard runs when activeTab='dashboard' and depends on stats.draftItems
PlasiyerDashboardShell.jsx refactor is correct - loadProducts is effect-local async function with empty deps array
No stale closure issues detected - async functions capture fresh values within useEffect
context_for_next_testing_agent: Code Quality Q2 batch verified.
